headline: Stablecoin Yield Deal Removes Obstacle to Crypto Bill. What It Means For Coinbase.
summary: It’s a big step forward, but there’s still significant uncertainty that the bill has time to become law this year.

headline: Bitcoin hovers above $78,000 as ETF inflows lead to best month since April 2025
summary: Investing.com -- Bitcoin prices edged higher on Saturday, extending a bullish streak as the market absorbed record-breaking institutional demand from April.

headline: Coinbase secures stablecoin yield compromise, paving way for U.S. crypto bill
summary: Investing.com -- Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ:COIN) announced Friday that a breakthrough agreement has been reached regarding stablecoin yield provisions, potentially breaking a months-long legislative stalemate in the U.S. Senate.

raw.headline: Coinbase secures stablecoin yield compromise, paving way for U.S. crypto bill
